note: Build matrix for the numan#30 CI build+sign pipeline. Each active plugin is cross-compiled from its upstream tag, packaged per target (.tar.gz on Unix, .zip on Windows), and published as a GitHub release asset on THIS repo. numan-registry then pins those asset URLs via scripts/add-package.py and signs the index with the trust root. This repo never holds signing keys.

active.name: nu_plugin_highlight
active.exclude_reason: macos-13 (Intel) runner queue was stuck >1hr on 2026-07-11; re-add once GH Actions macOS capacity recovers
active.description: Syntax highlighting for Nushell values and code.

active.name: nu_plugin_regex
active.exclude_reason: macos-13 (Intel) runner queue was stuck >1hr on 2026-07-11; re-add once GH Actions macOS capacity recovers
active.description: Search text with regular expressions in Nushell pipelines.

active.name: nu_plugin_dns
active.exclude_reason: windows: upstream Cargo.lock has conflicting windows-sys versions, nu-protocol 0.113 GUID type mismatch (E0308), upstream does not build Windows. x86_64-apple-darwin: macos-13 (Intel) runner queue was stuck >1hr on 2026-07-11, re-add once GH Actions macOS capacity recovers

active.name: nu_plugin_skim
active.exclude_reason: macos-13 (Intel) runner queue was stuck >1hr on 2026-07-11; re-add once GH Actions macOS capacity recovers

backlog_note: Remaining demand-ranked source-only plugins live in docs/backlog.json (generated from the awesome-nu triage). Promote entries into `active` in small batches after each passes real-Nu install on all targets.
